name: bookworm
description: Bookworm turns long EPUB/PDF books into Obsidian-ready working digests with visual assets.

interface.longDescription: Bookworm helps Codex read practical non-fiction books from EPUB or long PDF files, extract the core ideas, preserve important diagrams, and produce one reader-facing Obsidian Markdown note per book.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Bookworm to create an Obsidian-ready working digest for this book.
